headline: Trane Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Bookings, Backlog
summary: TT tops Q1 estimates as bookings jumped 24% and backlog hit a record $10.7B, prompting a higher 2026 outlook.

raw.headline: Trane Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Bookings, Backlog

headline: Trane (TT) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: With our leading innovation, Trane Technologies plc is uniquely positioned to win.  Q1 was another strong quarter marked by exceptional enterprise organic bookings, up 24%, and record backlog of 10.7 billion, up over 30% versus year-end 2025.  This strong performance translated to adjusted EPS growth of 7%.

headline: Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT) Beats Q1 Estimates, Bookings Surge 27%, Raises Full-Year Guidance
summary: Trane Technologies beats Q1 estimates with record $6.7B bookings and raised 2026 guidance. EPS hit $2.63 on $4.97B revenue, with a 27% surge in demand and strong Americas growth.

headline: Trane Technologies’s (NYSE:TT) Q1 CY2026 Sales Top Estimates
summary: HVAC company Trane (NYSE:TT) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 6% year on year to $4.97 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.63 per share was 3.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Trane Technologies Reports Strong First Quarter Results; Raises Full-Year Revenue and EPS Guidance
summary: SWORDS, Ireland, April 30, 2026--Trane Technologies plc (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, today reported diluted earnings per share (EPS) from continuing operations of $2.66 for the first quarter of 2026. Adjusted continuing EPS was $2.63, up 7 percent.
